top.title: Four crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
top.summary: The US Central Command says rescue efforts continue after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

top.title: 'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded in the Gulf
top.summary: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

top.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
top.summary: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

top.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
top.summary: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

top.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
top.summary: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

top.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
top.summary: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

title.#text: The MacBook Neo is a winner
PSA: Don’t buy a $4,400 gray market Samsung TriFold on eBay
PC makers are not ready for the MacBook Neo
